_comment: RAT ui/v1 conformance vectors — the golden data for the experience-axis `ui` reference (plugins/ui/web-portal-py). A `kind: ui` plugin is an experience surface; the platform's multi-UI story (overview.md / Phase 5) is 'each UI is a separate ui plugin'. The contract is deliberately thin — a UI mostly CONSUMES the API gateway like any other client. What the core needs is (a) Describe: discovery of the surfaces/slots this UI exposes, and (b) RenderSlot: resolving a slot + a contributing component to render info (asset ref + props schema), so OTHER plugins can contribute components into a UI's slots via contributes.slots[].target in their plugin.v1.json. Slot ids are capability-shaped URIs (rat://ui/v1/<slot>). Unlike storage, this axis carries no tenant/context — Describe/RenderSlot are surface metadata, not tenant-scoped operations. The harness asserts: display_name + the SET of hosted slot ids on Describe; a known component resolves to a non-empty asset_ref + a non-empty JSON-object props_schema; an unknown component → NOT_FOUND.
